positive: A whimsical, stylized graphic illustration featuring a group of interconnected, fantastical woodland creatures (foxes, deer, owls, rabbits) joyfully exploring a glowing, bioluminescent forest. The style should be detailed neo-vintage children's book illustration mixed with clean modern vector art, utilizing strong, saturated jewel tones (emerald, sapphire, amethyst) contrasted with deep forest greens and touches of glowing cyan. Focus on a central, harmonious composition with clear, readable silhouettes. The characters should be rendered in a kawaii-inspired but sophisticated manner, surrounded by large, stylized flora (mushrooms, ferns, glowing vines). The composition must be highly symmetrical and perfectly centered for apparel printing, emphasizing clean lines, solid color blocking, and minimal gradients. Studio shot, concept art, perfect symmetry, high detail, print-ready.
negative: blurry, noisy, grain, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, low quality, extra limbs, bad anatomy, asymmetrical, photographic, messy, gradient, sketch
